name: wren-mcp
description: Read your local Wren notes in Claude — and capture new ones to your Wren inbox for review.
long_description: Lets Claude Desktop read the notes in your local Wren notes folder (search, list, read, and browse the catalog) and create new notes. Created notes are staged in your Wren _inbox/ for you to review and keep in the Wren app — they are not added to your notes automatically. Your notes never leave your computer: this is a local server that only reads the folder you choose. Claude Desktop only.

tools.name: wren_search_notes
tools.description: Search notes by text, tag, or due date (metadata only).

tools.name: wren_read_note
tools.description: Read one note in full by its wrenId.

tools.name: wren_create_note
tools.description: Create a note, staged in the Wren inbox for review.

notes_dir.title: Wren notes folder
notes_dir.description: The folder where your Wren notes live (the folder you chose in the Wren app). Your notes never leave your computer.
